memoryArtifacts.headline: Relationship
memoryArtifacts.description: Katherine was the sister to Thomas Cromwell

memoryArtifacts.headline: Thomas Cromwell's Sister
memoryArtifacts.description: Cromwell had two sisters: the elder, Katherine (great-great-grandmother of Oliver Cromwell), married Morgan (ap William) Williams, a Welsh lawyer's son who came to Surrey as a follower of King Henry V …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Cromwell於1477年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾諾維爾時，她的父親Walter Smyth Cromwell27歲，母親Catherine Glossop23歲。她於大約1494年與Morgan ap William在英國英格蘭素瑞普特尼結婚。他們至少是15個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1533年在英國米德萊可易斯林頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可可拉肯維爾 聖 詹姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Cromwell于1477年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾諾維爾时，她的父亲Walter Smyth Cromwell27岁，母亲Catherine Glossop23岁。她于大约1494年与Morgan ap William在英国英格兰素瑞普特尼结婚。他们至少是15个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1533年在英国米德萊可易斯林頓享年56岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可可拉肯維爾 聖 詹姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Cromwell was born in 1477, in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Walter Smyth Cromwell, was 27 and her mother, Catherine Glossop, was 23. She married Morgan ap William about 1494, in Putney, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 15 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1533, in Islington, Middlesex, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, England.

et.Erie, New York,: Erie, New Yorgi osariik, Ameerika Ühendriigid

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Cromwell est née en 1477, à Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Smyth Cromwell, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Catherine Glossop, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Morgan ap William environ 1494, à Putney, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 15 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1533, à Islington, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Cromwell 1477 in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Smyth Cromwell 27 und ihre Mutter Catherine Glossop 23. Sie hat um 1494 in Putney, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Morgan ap William geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 15 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1533 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Islington, Middlesex, England und wurde in Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Cromwell è nata il nel 1477 nel Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Walter Smyth Cromwell, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Catherine Glossop, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Morgan ap William circa 1494, nel Putney, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 15 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1533, nel Islington, Middlesex, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Cromwellが1477年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノーウエルで生まれた時，父Walter Smyth Cromwellは27歳，母Catherine Glossopは23歳であった。約1494年にイギリスイギリススリープウトニーでMorgan ap Williamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも15人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1533年にイギリスミッドレセックスイスリントンで56歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスクラーケンウエル スト ジャムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Cromwell(이)가 1477년 영국 노틴그함실르 노웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Smyth Cromwell(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Glossop(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 풋니에서 Morgan ap William(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1533년 영국 미들레세스 이슬링턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 클레르켄웰 스트 자메스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Cromwell nasceu em 1477, em Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Smyth Cromwell, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Glossop, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Morgan ap William aproximadamente 1494, em Putney, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 15 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1533, em Islington, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ro.Erie, New York,: Erie, New York, Statele Unite ale Americii

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Cromwell родилась в 1477 г. в местности норвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Smyth Cromwell было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Glossop, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Morgan ap William около 1494 г. в местности путни, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1533 г. в местности ислингтон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности клиркенвелл ст джемесь, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Cromwell nació en 1477, en Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Smyth Cromwell, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Catherine Glossop, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Morgan ap William aproximadamente 1494, en Putney, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 15 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1533, en Islington, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
